tux-sst-search-info: Isticmaal hawlwadeennada language: ama group: si aad u sii qeexdo shuruudaha raadinta
tux-sst-count: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal natiijo ayaa la helay|$1 natiijo ayaa la helay}}
tux-sst-nosolr-body: Wiki-gan ma laha adeeg raadinta tarjumaadaha.
tux-sst-solr-offline-body: Adeegga raadintu si ku meel gaar ah uma shaqaynayo.
tux-sst-untranslated: Ma jiro tarjumaad laga soo qaatay $1
tux-sst-outdated: Tarjumaadaha duugoobay ee laga soo qaatay $1
tux-sst-match-message: Muujinaya tarjumaadaha ku habboon mid kasta oo ka mid ah erayada raadinta. $1
tux-sst-error-offset: Ma jiraan natiijooyin raadis oo dheeraad ah oo la muujin karo. Fadlan yaree raadintaada.
tux-sst-error-language: Luqaddan looma isticmaali karo noocan raadinta ah.
